name: gluezero-monorepo

scripts.build: pnpm run build:f3 && pnpm --filter @gluezero/worker --filter @gluezero/cache run build && pnpm --filter @gluezero/theme run build && pnpm --filter @gluezero/devtools --filter @gluezero/gluezero run build
scripts.build:f3: pnpm --filter @gluezero/core --filter @gluezero/mapper run build && pnpm run build:f3:cyclic
scripts.build:f3:cyclic: pnpm --filter @gluezero/routing exec tsup --format esm --no-dts && pnpm --filter @gluezero/gateway exec tsup --format esm --no-dts && pnpm run build:f3:dts:bootstrap && pnpm run build:f3:dts:bundle
scripts.build:f3:dts:bootstrap: pnpm --filter @gluezero/routing exec tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --noEmit false --declaration --declarationDir dist > /dev/null 2>&1 || true; pnpm --filter @gluezero/gateway exec tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --noEmit false --declaration --declarationDir dist > /dev/null 2>&1 || true
scripts.build:f3:dts:bundle: find packages/routing/dist -name '*.d.ts' -delete; find packages/routing/dist -name '*.d.ts.map' -delete; pnpm --filter @gluezero/routing exec tsup --dts-only --no-clean && find packages/gateway/dist -name '*.d.ts' -delete; find packages/gateway/dist -name '*.d.ts.map' -delete; pnpm --filter @gluezero/gateway exec tsup --dts-only --no-clean
scripts.ci:gate:f3: pnpm ci:publint && pnpm ci:attw && pnpm ci:size
scripts.ci:gate:f6: pnpm ci:publint && pnpm ci:attw && pnpm ci:size
scripts.ci:gate:f8: pnpm ci:publint && pnpm ci:attw && pnpm ci:size
scripts.ci:gate:f9: pnpm exec playwright install --with-deps chromium && pnpm ci:publint && pnpm ci:attw && pnpm --filter @gluezero/mf-esm test:browser && pnpm ci:size
scripts.ci:gate:f10: pnpm ci:publint && pnpm ci:attw && pnpm --filter @gluezero/context test && pnpm --filter @gluezero/context test:integration && pnpm ci:size
scripts.ci:gate:f11: pnpm ci:publint && pnpm ci:attw && pnpm --filter @gluezero/permissions test && pnpm --filter @gluezero/permissions test:integration && pnpm ci:size && bash -c 'F10_END=27dd7db; test -z "$(git diff $F10_END..HEAD -- packages/core/src/)" && test -z "$(git diff $F10_END..HEAD -- packages/microfrontends/src/)" && test -z "$(git diff $F10_END..HEAD -- packages/mapper/src/)"' && pnpm --filter @gluezero/core test -- pipeline-harness
scripts.ci:gate:f12: pnpm ci:publint && pnpm ci:attw && pnpm --filter @gluezero/compat test && pnpm --filter @gluezero/compat test:integration && pnpm ci:size && pnpm --filter @gluezero/core test -- v1-bc-replay && bash -c 'F10_END=27dd7db; F11_END=$(git log --extended-regexp --grep="^docs\(11-05-permissions-closure\):" --format=%H -1); [ -n "$F11_END" ] || { echo "F11_END not resolved (grep pattern miss — pattern ^docs(11-05-permissions-closure):)"; exit 1; }; test -z "$(git diff $F10_END..HEAD -- packages/core/src/)" && test -z "$(git diff $F10_END..HEAD -- packages/microfrontends/src/)" && test -z "$(git diff $F10_END..HEAD -- packages/mapper/src/)" && test -z "$(git diff $F11_END..HEAD -- packages/permissions/src/)"'
scripts.ci:gate:f13: pnpm ci:publint && pnpm ci:attw && pnpm --filter @gluezero/isolation build && pnpm --filter @gluezero/isolation test && pnpm --filter @gluezero/isolation test:integration && pnpm ci:size && pnpm --filter @gluezero/core test -- v1-bc-replay && pnpm --filter @gluezero/core test -- pipeline-harness && pnpm ci:check:d83:f13

description: GlueZero monorepo — frontend integration runtime for modular browser applications. 8 published @gluezero/* packages.
author: Omar Di Marzio
